overview: TradeSignal Pro is a premium trading signal platform where admins post trade signals with screenshots, mark outcomes as success or failed, and manage subscriptions. Users subscribe via UPI payment and get access to real-time trade signals, stats, and history. Non-subscribers can preview successful past trades to build trust before buying.
features: Trading signals with screenshots and outcome tracking
Subscription-based access via UPI manual payment
Non-subscriber preview of successful past trades
Admin optional proof upload when marking trade success
Premium payment page with live trust stats (win rate, active subscribers, total signals)
User profiles with red verified tick for active subscribers
Admin panel: signal management, payment approval, settings
